accounts.hint: 示例：[{"name":"异环","platform":"tajiduo","phone":"手机号","password":"密码"},{"name":"绝区零","platform":"mihoyo","cookie":"APP抓包cookie"},{"name":"鸣潮","platform":"kuro","token":"APP抓包token"}]

auto_sign_enabled.hint: 开启后每天定时自动执行签到

notify_session.description: 签到结果推送目标 unified_msg_origin（留空不推送）
notify_session.hint: 填写 unified_msg_origin，如 astrbot:GroupMessage:xxx；也可在目标会话中使用 /gacha-sign bind 自动绑定。
